race.comment: DAGGERS (7) has raced twice since arriving in the Gollan stable and had every chance on both occasions but failed to live up to the short quotes. Finding the line as though 1400m as what he is after. Worth one more chance although the wide gate puts a dampener on things. MISS BUSSLINGER (13) has also been done no favours at the barrier draw but looms as a threat. Raced very well until failing in the Midway Championship final at Randwick four weeks ago. Loves the sting out so she just needs luck to play a key role. DEEP RESPECT (5) closed well without threatening when fresh from a spell over 1200m at Eagle Farm recently. Four-time winner at 1400m so he can improve in this more suitable race. EYE OF THE EAGLE (8) has been hard to fault in four runs this prep, all at 1200m. Handles soft ground and the extra 200m comes at a perfect time. AMPLIFY (9) resumes. Opened last prep with a barnstorming victory at Randwick - she must be considered.
